---
title: "Toward Childhoods Free From Violence"
subtitle: "50 Years of Research Tells Us to End Corporal Punishment"
author:  Andy Grogan-Kaylor 
date: "2026-7-3"
categories: [multilevel, corporal punishment, positive parenting, MICS]
image: "caregiving.png"
draft: false
---

Slides from a talk that I have been working on.

"Toward Childhoods Free From Violence: 50 Years of Research Tells Us to End Corporal Punishment"

[https://agrogan1.github.io/toward-childhoods-free-from-violence/](https://agrogan1.github.io/toward-childhoods-free-from-violence/)

```{r}

knitr::include_url("https://agrogan1.github.io/toward-childhoods-free-from-violence/")

```
